failedAssertions.reason: Fail: the flow never reaches the required 'Check your email' success state for either registered or unregistered addresses because the backend returns RESET_PASSWORD_DISABLED.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked because the real forgot-password endpoint is disabled in this environment, so a valid reset token was unattainable and the success path could not be exercised.
Blocked because this environment has no Anthropic API key, so an analyzed interview could not be produced within the isolated account and the analyzed-status preservation path could not be exercised.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that forgot-password/reset-token acquisition is currently blocked because POST /api/auth/request-password-reset returns RESET_PASSWORD_DISABLED for both registered and unregistered emails.
Documented the working repo-shell auth/app endpoint sequence and the browser fetch-wrapper fallback for exposing real loading states when agent-browser misses app fetch traffic.
